calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David McKim for Steve Rossa.

Mr. McKim provided background information, stated that there is another claim for construction work that was performed by the Decedent, that those Clients have been advised not to pay, and that he is trying to arrange for Probate Counsel to step in and assist. The Court stated that it is not confident that things will change. The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Continued To Jan-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Continued To Nov-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David McKim for Steve Rossa.

Mr. McKim stated that the Family is not interested in the matter, that Attorney Laura Golden is willing to come in and assist, and that they have a mechanics lien. Mr. McKim also stated that there is a trust, that the house was in the Trust and that he was told by a Realtor that the house was lost in foreclosure. In addition, Mr. McKim stated that the Decedent had another project he was working on for which he was owed money and that the Person owing the money is willing to pay but only to someone who has authority to sign a release. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to November 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status.

Judge: Anne Bouliane. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Sep-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Continued To Sep-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David McKim for Steve Rossa.

The Court advised Counsel that he needs to comply with responding to the Probate Examiner's notes and correct the defects that were pointed out by the Examiner. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to September 9, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Bradley.
